text: The commissioner may in his discretion enter into contracts with other outside agencies to provide testing devices, supply facilities, maintain and conduct experimental motor vehicle inspections under his direction and supervision.

# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 3
#### Article 5
##### § 309-C — Contracts

The commissioner may in his discretion enter into contracts with other outside agencies to provide testing devices, supply facilities, maintain and conduct experimental motor vehicle inspections under his direction and supervision.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
